General.Name: Mister Spex SE
General.Description: Mister Spex SE retails optical products in Germany and internationally. It offers prescription and multifocal glasses, sunglasses, and contact lenses, as well as miscellaneous services. The company offers its products under the independent labels, own labels, and various premium and luxury brands through online shops and retail stores, as well as a network of partner opticians. Mister Spex SE was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
